title: MindsDB AI Agents — Real Model Execution & Multi-Agent Coordination
description: mindsdb_agents.py defines 5 agent classes (SecurityAnalyst, Pentest, Compliance, Remediation, Orchestrator) with AgentCapability and ModelType enums. process() and execute_action() are abstract methods. The agents are designed to use MindsDB ML but no actual ML model calls are wired — all implementations return stub responses.
missing: MindsDB connection: implement MindsDBClient that connects to the MindsDB instance (MINDSDB_HOST/PORT env vars) and executes ML queries via MySQL protocol
SecurityAnalystAgent real execution: implement process() to query the MindsDB vulnerability_classifier model with finding JSON and return risk score
Orchestrator multi-agent coordination: implement OrchestratorAgent.coordinate() that spawns sub-agent tasks in parallel using asyncio.gather and merges results
